name: Better Stack
description: Uptime monitoring, incident management, and on-call scheduling platform. Monitor uptime status, track incidents, and review team member access controls.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Better Stack at https://betterstack.com
2. Go to Settings > API tokens (https://betterstack.com/settings/global-api-tokens)
3. Copy an existing Global API token or create a new one
4. Paste the token below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Better Stack API token. Get it from Better Stack Dashboard > Settings > API tokens. You can use either a Global API token or an Uptime API token.

checks.name: Uptime Monitors
checks.description: Lists all uptime monitors and their current status. Monitors with 'down' status are flagged as findings.

checks.name: Incident Response
checks.description: Lists recent incidents and their resolution status. Unresolved incidents that have not been acknowledged are flagged.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all team members with their roles and invitation status. Verifies employee access controls.
